package.name: talos_ground_removal
package.description: Patchwork++ tabanli zemin ayiklama. Sensor cevresini esmerkezli halka/ sektorlere bolup (CZM) her hucreye yerel duzlem oturtur (R-GPF), egim/ yukseklik esiklerini adaptif gunceller (A-GLE) ve kare-arasi ground revert (TGR) yapar. Cikti: zemin cikarilmis engel bulutu + ayrik zemin bulutu. Cekirdek: vendor'lanmis PatchWorkpp (include/patchworkpp, MIT, url-kaist).
